metadata.changelog: 1.0.1 — operatorUi with report screens (was reports-only / no Operator sync)

reports.title: Готовые позиции
reports.query: SELECT item_code, status FROM demo_item WHERE status = ? ORDER BY item_code

reports.title: Сводка по статусам
reports.query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM demo_item GROUP BY status ORDER BY status

reports.title: Позиции по категории
reports.query: SELECT i.item_code, i.status, c.category_code FROM demo_item i JOIN demo_category c ON c.id = i.category_id ORDER BY c.category_code, i.item_code

screens.title: Готовые позиции
screens.description: Отчёт ready-items: позиции со статусом ready
